subject: fix(pwa): show manual install instructions when beforeinstallprompt is blocked
body:
Brave browser on Android blocks the beforeinstallprompt event due to
privacy shields, leaving users with no way to install the PWA. The hook
previously only showed manual instructions for non-Chromium browsers
(Safari, Firefox), assuming all Chromium browsers would fire the event.

Add a 3-second timeout fallback: if a Chromium browser hasn't fired
beforeinstallprompt after mount, show manual install instructions as a
fallback. The native prompt still takes priority if it fires.

Tags: pwa, brave, install, mobile, a11y
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01PMGH3v5BDL5Q3gzjqLTJFh
title: show manual install instructions when beforeinstallprompt is blocked
